markdownRemark.html:
본 환경은 테스트를 위해 구동 되었고, 구동되어야 합니다.

방법

  • https://github.com/steveswinsburg/oracle19c-docker
  • 참고

순서

  • git clone https://github.com/oracle/docker-images
  • ORACLE 19C, LINUX.X64193000db_home.zip Download 링크
  • mv ./LINUX.X64193000db_home.zip ./docker-images/OracleDatabase/SingleInstance/dockerfiles/19.3.0
  • vim ./docker-images/OracleDatabase/SingleInstance/dockerfiles/19.3.0/dbca.rsp.tmpl
  • fix totalMemory=2048 to 4096 or you want

  • run docker

    docker run \
--name oracle19c \
-p 1521:1521 \
-p 5500:5500 \
-e ORACLE_SID=orcl \
-e ORACLE_PDB=orcl1 \
-e ORACLE_PWD=password1234 \
-e ORACLE_MEM=4096 \
-e ORACLE_CHARACTERSET=utf8 \
-v /opt/oracle/oradata \
-v /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro \
-d \
oracle/database:19.3.0-ee

  • ojdbc connect url, username, password

    jdbc:oracle:thin:@192.168.0.65:1521:orcl1
username : system
password : password1234
  • ojdbc8.jar 필요
  • jdk, jre 8 필요
  • Oracle 이미지 생성 및 초기 구동에 시간이 필요
  • 기타 세부사항은 레퍼런스 페이지 참조

reference

  • https://github.com/steveswinsburg/oracle19c-docker
  • https://github.com/oracle/docker-images
